Rule: w-64 bg-[#1e293b] Desktop / MobileSidebar on mobile
Strict props interface + React.FC or arrow function with typed props
Detail: interface ButtonProps { label: string; onClick: () => void }

Rule: Extract shared logic to custom hooks
Mark interactive components with 'use client' — keep server components by default

Detail: Success for actions / Error for API failures
Manual trigger only (No auto-fetch on keystroke)

Rule: Never mutate state directly — use set() updater
Save filters/pagination limit in localStorage via zustand/middleware
optional chaining (?.) for deep access + fallback images for avatars
Show empty-message component when list is empty
Use Next.js Server Actions for mutations where possible
Place API routes in app/api/[route]/route.ts following REST conventions
Define Interface for every API response and entity
Use Zod for runtime validation on forms and API inputs
Use next/dynamic for heavy off-screen components
Apply loading state on buttons / Skeleton for lists
Framer Motion or CSS transition classes for pages and modals
Conditional rendering: short-circuit && for frequent toggles / lazy dynamic for heavy components
next build must pass with zero errors and warnings
Use next/image with width/height props — never raw for app images
